featuredCampaigns.title: Leadership Training Fund
featuredCampaigns.description: Equipping a generation of mission-minded leaders through conferences, discipleship resources, and mentorship across Asia.

upcomingCampaigns.title: Clean Water Initiative
upcomingCampaigns.description: Help bring clean drinking water to communities in need. Every donation builds wells and water filtration systems.

upcomingCampaigns.title: Education for All
upcomingCampaigns.description: Support scholarships and school supplies for underprivileged children around the world.

upcomingCampaigns.title: Disaster Relief Fund
upcomingCampaigns.description: Provide emergency aid — food, shelter, and medical care — to families affected by natural disasters.

givingOptions.question: How do I make a donation?
givingOptions.answer: You can donate online via credit card, PayPal, or bank transfer. Choose the option that works best for you from the methods above.

givingOptions.question: Can I donate anonymously?
givingOptions.answer: Yes, you can choose to remain anonymous. Your donation will still be processed, but your name will not appear in any public materials.

givingOptions.question: Is my donation tax-deductible?
givingOptions.answer: Donations are tax-deductible in the countries where we are registered as a nonprofit. A receipt will be emailed to you after your donation.

givingOptions.question: Can I set up a recurring donation?
givingOptions.answer: Absolutely. You can choose monthly, quarterly, or annual recurring donations. You can cancel or change the amount at any time.

givingOptions.question: How is my donation used?
givingOptions.answer: Your donation goes directly toward funding our campaigns and programs. Administrative costs are kept to a minimum to maximize impact.
